summary: Phase 1 Features VERIFIED: Ad Spy / Ad Intelligence page, Profitability Simulator page, 7-Signal Score Breakdown Panel on product detail, and ShareSnippet component. All backend APIs pass 21/21 tests. All frontend components render correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

issues: Mixed content warning: HTTP notification requests blocked on HTTPS page - pre-existing issue from previous iterations

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?q=&limit=24 returns 24 ads
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?q=pillow returns filtered results (2 ads)
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?platform=tiktok filters correctly (all returned ads have platform=tiktok)
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?platform=meta filters correctly (all returned ads have platform=meta)
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?platform=all returns ads from multiple platforms
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?sort=engagement sorts by engagement
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?sort=recent sorts by most recent
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover?sort=spend sorts by ad spend
BACKEND: Ad object structure has required fields (id, platform, headline, thumbnail_url)
BACKEND: POST /api/tools/profitability-simulator returns unit_economics, monthly_projection, saturation_analysis, verdict
BACKEND: Unit economics contains margin_per_unit, margin_percent, estimated_cpa, break_even_cpa, is_profitable_per_sale
BACKEND: Monthly projection contains ad_budget, estimated_orders, revenue, profit, roas
BACKEND: Saturation analysis contains competition_level, estimated_months_to_saturation, saturation_risk
BACKEND: Verdict types return correctly (Strong opportunity, Promising with optimisation, Risky, Not viable)
BACKEND: Competition levels low/medium/high affect saturation correctly
BACKEND: GET /api/products/{id}/launch-score-breakdown returns product data
BACKEND: Launch score breakdown has 7 signal components (trend, margin, competition, ad_activity, supplier_demand, search_growth, social_buzz)
BACKEND: Each component has required fields (name, key, raw_score, weight, weight_percent, contribution, explanation)
BACKEND: Launch score breakdown includes formula description and breakdown
BACKEND: Launch score breakdown includes summary with rating_explanation
BACKEND: Returns 404 for invalid product ID
FRONTEND: Sidebar has 'Ad Intelligence' nav link at /ad-spy
FRONTEND: Sidebar has 'Profit Simulator' nav link at /profitability-simulator
FRONTEND: Ad Spy page loads with title 'Ad Intelligence'
FRONTEND: Ad Spy shows '24 ads found' badge
FRONTEND: Platform filter buttons present (All Platforms, TikTok, Meta/Facebook, Pinterest)
FRONTEND: Sort dropdown present with engagement/recent/spend options
FRONTEND: Search functionality works - searching 'LED' returns 8 results
FRONTEND: Ad cards display correctly with data-testid='ad-card'
FRONTEND: Profitability Simulator page loads with title 'Profitability Simulator'
FRONTEND: Input fields have correct defaults (Product Cost=12, Selling Price=29.99)
FRONTEND: Competition level buttons (Low/Medium/High) present
FRONTEND: Run Simulation button triggers API call
FRONTEND: Verdict panel displays with results (data-testid='simulator-verdict')
FRONTEND: Unit Economics panel displays (data-testid='unit-economics')
FRONTEND: Monthly Projection panel displays (data-testid='monthly-projection')
FRONTEND: Saturation Risk panel displays (data-testid='saturation-analysis')
FRONTEND: Product Detail page shows Score Breakdown Panel (data-testid='score-breakdown-panel')
FRONTEND: 7-Signal Launch Score section visible with formula
FRONTEND: All 7 signal components render (trend, margin, competition, ad_activity, search_growth, social_buzz, supplier_demand)
FRONTEND: Share Snippet component present (data-testid='share-snippet')
FRONTEND: Twitter share button present (data-testid='share-twitter')
FRONTEND: Copy Link button present (data-testid='share-copy-link')

verified_features.verification: Page loads at /ad-spy with 24 ads, search works, platform filters work (TikTok/Meta/Pinterest/All), sort options work (engagement/recent/spend)
Form loads with defaults, inputs are editable, Run Simulation triggers API, results display verdict, unit economics, monthly projection, saturation risk

Panel displays on product detail page with all 7 signals (Trend Momentum, Profit Margins, Market Accessibility, Advertiser Validation, Supplier Reliability, Search Growth, Social Buzz), each with progress bar, contribution score, and explanation
Component renders on product detail page with Tweet button and Copy Link button
'Ad Intelligence' link (href=/ad-spy) and 'Profit Simulator' link (href=/profitability-simulator) present in sidebar

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from products collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features fully verified: (1) Ad Spy page at /ad-spy with ads discover endpoint, (2) Profitability Simulator at /profitability-simulator with POST endpoint, (3) 7-Signal Score Breakdown on product detail pages, (4) ShareSnippet component with Tweet and Copy Link buttons. All data-testid attributes properly implemented. Mixed content notification warning is a pre-existing unrelated issue.
